016package org.consensusj.exchange;
017
018import org.consensusj.exchange.knowm.KnowmExchangeRateProvider;
019import org.knowm.xchange.Exchange;
020import org.knowm.xchange.currency.CurrencyPair;
021import org.knowm.xchange.dto.marketdata.Ticker;
022import org.slf4j.Logger;
023import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
024
025import javax.money.CurrencyUnit;
026import javax.money.convert.ExchangeRateProvider;
027import java.io.IOException;
028import java.util.ArrayList;
029import java.util.Arrays;
030import java.util.Collection;
031import java.util.HashMap;
032import java.util.List;
033import java.util.Map;
034import java.util.concurrent.CountDownLatch;
035import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
036import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
037import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledFuture;
038import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
039import java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException;
040import java.util.stream.Collectors;
041
042/**
043 *  Base ExchangeRateProvider using XChange library
044 *  Currently supports current DEFERRED rates only
045 * @deprecated Will be removed in the next release.
046 */
047@Deprecated
048public final class BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider extends KnowmExchangeRateProvider implements ExchangeRateProvider, ObservableExchangeRateProvider {
049    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider.class);
050    private static final int initialDelay = 0;
051    private static final int period = 60;
052
053    private final ScheduledExecutorService stpe;
054    private volatile boolean started = false;
055    private volatile boolean stopping = false;
056    private ScheduledFuture<?> future;
057
058    /**
059     * Construct using an XChange Exchange class object for a set of currencies
060     * @param exchangeClassName Classname of XChange exchange we are wrapping
061     * @param scheduledExecutorService Executor service for running polling task
062     * @param pairs pairs to monitor
063     */
064    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(String exchangeClassName,
065                                              ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService,
066                                              Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
067                                              Collection<CurrencyUnitPair> pairs) {
068        super(exchangeClassName, tickerSymbolConversions, pairs);
069        stpe = (scheduledExecutorService != null) ? scheduledExecutorService : Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(1);
070    }
071
072    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(String exchangeClassName,
073                                              ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService,
074                                              Map<CurrencyUnit, String> tickerSymbolConversions,
075                                              CurrencyUnitPair... pairs) {
076        this(exchangeClassName, scheduledExecutorService, tickerSymbolConversions, Arrays.asList(pairs));
077    }
078
079    /**
080     * Construct using an XChange Exchange class object for a set of currencies
081     * @param exchangeClass Class of XChange exchange we are wrapping
082     * @param pairs pairs to monitor
083     */
084    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(Class<? extends Exchange> exchangeClass,
085                                              CurrencyUnitPair... pairs) {
086        this(exchangeClass.getName(),
087                null,
088                null,
089                Arrays.asList(pairs));
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * Construct using an XChange Exchange class object for a set of currencies
094     * @param exchangeClass Class of XChange exchange we are wrapping
095     * @param scheduledExecutorService Executor service for running polling task
096     * @param pairs pairs to monitor
097     */
098    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(Class<? extends Exchange> exchangeClass,
099                                              ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService,
100                                              CurrencyUnitPair... pairs) {
101        this(exchangeClass.getName(), scheduledExecutorService, null, Arrays.asList(pairs));
102    }
103
104    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(Class<? extends Exchange> exchangeClass,
105                                              ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService,
106                                              String... pairs) {
107        this(exchangeClass.getName(), scheduledExecutorService, null, ExchangeUtils.pairsConvert(pairs));
108    }
109
110    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(Class<? extends Exchange> exchangeClass,
111                                              String... pairs) {
112        this(exchangeClass.getName(), null, null, ExchangeUtils.pairsConvert(pairs));
113    }
114
115    public BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider(String exchangeClassName, ScheduledExecutorService scheduledExecutorService, String[] pairs) {
116        this(exchangeClassName, scheduledExecutorService, null, ExchangeUtils.pairsConvert(pairs));
117    }
118    
119
120
121    /**
122     * Initialize the exchange provider and start polling thread
123     */
124    @Override
125    public synchronized void start()  {
126        if (!started) {
127            initialize();
128            future = stpe.scheduleWithFixedDelay(this::poll, initialDelay, period, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
129        }
130    }
131
132    /**
133     * stop the polling thread
134     */
135    @Override
136    public synchronized void stop() {
137        if (started && !stopping) {
138            stopping = true;
139            final ScheduledFuture<?> handle = future;
140            Runnable task = () -> handle.cancel(true);
141            stpe.schedule(task, 0, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
142        }
143    }
144
145    /**
146     * Poll the exchange for updated Tickers
147     */
148    void poll() {
149        monitoredCurrencies.forEach((key, monitor) -> {
150            try {
151                monitor.setTicker(marketDataService.getTicker(monitor.exchangePair));
152            } catch (IOException e) {
153                // TODO: Exceptions should not be swallowed here (or at least not all exceptions)
154                // Some IOExceptions may warrant retries, but not all of them
155                // log and ignore IOException (we'll try polling again next interval)
156                // Actually I'm seeing that the CoinMarketCap ticker is returning IOException
157                // when it should return NotAvailableFromExchangeException
158                log.error("IOException in BaseXChangeExchangeRateProvider::poll: {}", e);
159            }
160            notifyExchangeRateObservers(monitor);
161        });
162    }
163
164    @Override
165    public void registerExchangeRateObserver(CurrencyUnitPair pair, ExchangeRateObserver observer) {
166        // TODO: validate rate as one this provider supports
167        MonitoredCurrency monitor = monitoredCurrencies.get(pair);
168        monitor.observerList.add(observer);
169        // If we've got data already, call observer immediately
170        if (monitor.isTickerAvailable()) {
171            notifyObserver(observer, pair, monitor);
172        }
173    }
174
175    private void notifyExchangeRateObservers(MonitoredCurrency monitor) {
176        monitor.observerList.forEach(observer -> notifyObserver(observer, monitor.pair, monitor));
177    }
178
179    private void notifyObserver(ExchangeRateObserver observer, CurrencyUnitPair pair, MonitoredCurrency monitor) {
180        try {
181            observer.onExchangeRateChange(buildExchangeRateChange(pair, monitor.getTicker()));
182        } catch (InterruptedException e) {
183            Thread.currentThread().interrupt(); // Restore interruption flag just in case
184        } catch (TimeoutException e) {
185            throw new RuntimeException(e);      // Unlikely to happen since ticker has usually been fetched
186        }
187    }
188
189}
